package models

import (
	"time"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: AfterCreate hook on Order mutates an unrelated table (Inventory).
// The hook reaches beyond its own aggregate and writes to a different domain table.

type Order struct {
	ID        uint      `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	UserID    uint      `gorm:"column:user_id"`
	Total     float64   `gorm:"column:total"`
	CreatedAt time.Time `gorm:"column:created_at"`
}

type Inventory struct {
	ID       uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	SKU      string `gorm:"column:sku"`
	Quantity int    `gorm:"column:quantity"`
}

func (o *Order) AfterCreate(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	// Mutates an unrelated table — Inventory has no ownership relationship to Order.
	return tx.Table("inventories").
		Where("sku = ?", "DEFAULT").
		UpdateColumn("quantity", gorm.Expr("quantity - 1")).Error
}
